sections.paragraph:
- Original: βότρυς

- Transliteration: Botrus

- Phonetic: bot'-rooce

- Definition:

1. a bunch or cluster of grapes

- Origin: of uncertain derivation

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: Of uncertain derivation; a bunch (of grapes): - (vine) cluster (of the vine).
